. .. ...... The earlier Hindus had well organised governments, much
lauded by the Greek writers, to whom we owe our earliest reliable
notices of India, for the wise and thoughtful manner in which the in
terests of trade and agriculture were protected, the wants of stangers
as of the sick and needy, supplied and t.he defences of the state secured.
